description_long: This humanoid robot features a skeletal, mechanical frame with exposed joints and components, giving it an industrial and utilitarian appearance. Its head is boxy with two prominent, round eye-like elements and a visible mouth structure, suggesting basic facial expressiveness. The arms are long and thin, extending straight out to the sides, with multiple articulated segments and visible cabling or tubing along their length. The torso is compact and reinforced with mechanical linkages, while the legs are robust, jointed, and end in large, flat feet designed for stability. The entire structure is composed of dark, metallic materials, with a consistent matte black finish throughout. The robot's design emphasizes function and articulation, with no decorative coverings or clothing.
description: A skeletal, matte black humanoid robot with exposed joints, a boxy head with round eyes, and long articulated limbs. Its industrial design features robust legs and large feet for stability.
description_view_0: Front view shows the robot's symmetrical, T-pose stance, boxy head with round eyes, and full extension of both arms.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thin profile, visible joint articulation, and the depth of the head and torso.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the head, mechanical spine, and the symmetrical structure of the arms and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the slimness of the frame and the mechanical details along the limbs.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms fully extended horizontally in a T-pose, legs straight and feet flat on the ground, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: Unclothed; only integrated mechanical panels and exposed structural components are visible.
attribute_facial_features: Boxy head with two large, round, white eye-like elements and a visible mouth structure; no nose or expressive display screens.
attribute_limb_articulation: Multiple visible hinge and rotary joints in the shoulders, elbows, wrists, hips, knees, and ankles; limbs appear highly articulated and flexible.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Two round eye-like elements on the head, likely functioning as cameras or visual sensors; no other sensors visible.
